bird.name: Keel-billed motmot
bird.summary: The keel-billed motmot (Electron carinatum) is a Vulnerable species of bird in the motmot family Momotidae. It is found in Belize, Costa Ri…

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

relations.subject: Keel-billed motmot
relations.evidence: | page =322 }} The keel-billed motmot inhabits humid evergreen forest, and favors steep-sided gullies with streams

relations.subject: Keel-billed motmot
relations.evidence: In most areas it is threatened by continuing habitat loss due to logging, conversion to banana plantations, other agriculture, and ranching, and to human settlement
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Keel-billed motmot

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
